original_query: select  i_item_desc       ,w_warehouse_name       ,d1.d_week_seq       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is null then 1 else 0 end) no_promo       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is not null then 1 else 0 end) promo       ,count(*) total_cnt from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '>10000'   and d1.d_year = 2001   and cd_marital_status = 'W'   and cd_dep_count between 4 and 6   and i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 37 group by i_item_desc,w_warehouse_name,d1.d_week_seq order by total_cnt desc, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d_week_seq limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT cs_item_sk, cs_bill_cdemo_sk, cs_bill_hdemo_sk, cs_sold_date_sk, 
           cs_ship_date_sk, cs_promo_sk, cs_quantity, cs_order_number
    FROM catalog_sales
    WHERE cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 37
),
filtered_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_week_seq
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001
),
filtered_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk, i_item_desc, i_category
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
)
SELECT i_item_desc,
       w_warehouse_name,
       d1.d_week_seq,
       SUM(CASE WHEN p_promo_sk IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) no_promo,
       SUM(CASE WHEN p_promo_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) promo,
       COUNT(*) total_cnt
FROM filtered_sales cs
JOIN filtered_items i ON (i.i_item_sk = cs.cs_item_sk)
JOIN inventory inv ON (cs.cs_item_sk = inv.inv_item_sk)
JOIN warehouse w ON (w.w_warehouse_sk = inv.inv_warehouse_sk)
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON (cs.cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk)
JOIN household_demographics hd ON (cs.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk)
JOIN filtered_dates d1 ON (cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk)
JOIN date_dim d2 ON (inv.inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk)
JOIN date_dim d3 ON (cs.cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk)
LEFT OUTER JOIN promotion p ON (cs.cs_promo_sk = p.p_promo_sk)
WHERE d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq
  AND inv.inv_quantity_on_hand < cs.cs_quantity
  AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 day'
  AND hd.hd_buy_potential = '>10000'
  AND cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
  AND cd.cd_dep_count BETWEEN 4 AND 6
GROUP BY i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
ORDER BY total_cnt DESC, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Remove the unnecessary LEFT OUTER JOIN to catalog_returns as it's not used in the SELECT clause and can inflate the COUNT(*) values incorrectly.
